title: GPT-4 Fine-tuned Legal Assistant
description: A specialized GPT-4 fine-tune trained on 50k+ legal documents. Excels at contract review, case summarization, and legal research. Includes transfer of model weights and fine-tuning dataset.

title: Medical Diagnosis Assistant — Llama 3 Fine-tune
description: Llama 3 70B fine-tuned on clinical notes and medical literature. Specialized for differential diagnosis support and treatment protocol suggestions. HIPAA considerations included in documentation.

title: Coding Assistant API License — Claude Fine-tune
description: 12-month API access license for a Claude 3.5 Sonnet fine-tune specializing in TypeScript, React, and Next.js code generation. Includes 10M tokens/month and custom system prompt support.
